sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP(6), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, timestamp(6) '2023-10-01 10:00:00.123456', 'Start of October');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, timestamp(6) '2022-01-15 12:30:00.654321', 'Mid-January event');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (3, NULL, 'Event without a timestamp');
SELECT id, extract(year from event_time) as event_year, extract(month from event_time) as event_month FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT id, extract(quarter from event_time) as event_quarter FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_quarter;

SELECT A.id, A.event_time, B.id AS related_id FROM test_dates A JOIN (SELECT id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL) B ON extract(year from A.event_time) = extract(year from B.event_time) WHERE A.event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, extract(dow from event_time) as day_of_week FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL HAVING day_of_week IN (0, 1);
SELECT id, extract(hour from event_time) + extract(minute from event_time)/60.0 as hour_fraction FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, extract(doy from event_time) as day_of_year FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE extract(year from event_time) >= 2022;
INSERT INTO temp_dates VALUES (4, timestamp(6) '2023-11-30 15:45:00.987654', 'November event');
SELECT MAX(extract(doy from event_time)) as max_day_of_year FROM temp_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_time, extract(year from event_time) * 1000 + extract(month from event_time) as year_month_key FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year_month_key DESC;

SELECT A.id, A.event_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates B WHERE extract(month from B.event_time) = extract(month from A.event_time)) AS month_count FROM test_dates A WHERE A.event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, NULLIF(extract(day from event_time), 0) as safe_day FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, extract(year from event_time || ' ' || '10:00:00') as adjusted_year FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
